lanes.label: Fine Detail
lanes.description: Small critical features within a normal-sized subject. Tests whether the model resolves sub-object structure: weapon attachment points, fabric stitching, UI button states, watch face indices, product label edges.

lanes.label: Small Target in Wide Frame
lanes.description: Waldo-class challenge — tiny signal target embedded in dense distractor scene. Target occupies <2% of frame. Applies to crowd search, wildlife spotting, typo hunting, UI element location.

lanes.label: Dense Count
lanes.description: Count N instances of a class accurately when N is large enough to stress low-resolution vision. People in crowds, items on shelves, cells under microscope, list rows, grid cells.

lanes.label: Small Text / Numeric
lanes.description: Read small printed text or numbers precisely. Chart axis labels, dashboard readouts, product codes, receipt line items, UI stat panels. OCR-adjacent but focused on accuracy under scale.

lanes.label: Labeled Grid
lanes.description: Parse a grid where each cell carries a per-cell label. Sprite sheets, spreadsheet screenshots, contact sheets, chessboard positions, calendar grids.

lanes.label: A/B Compare
lanes.description: Two near-identical images — name the differences. Visual regression, before/after edits, sprite iterations, photo retouching, diff review.

lanes.label: Layout / Hierarchy
lanes.description: Structural and positional comprehension. Webpage layouts, UI hierarchies, architectural elevations, scene composition, org charts.

lanes.label: Chart / Data Viz
lanes.description: Extract quantitative values from visualizations. Line charts, bar charts, pie charts, scatter plots, dashboards, scientific figures.
